User.title: User
User.description: User profile with activation and verification status

isActive.description: Indicates if the user has an active, paid account

paymentStatus.description: The payment status of the user, e.g., unpaid, paid, pending_verification

bypassPayment.description: True if user was activated via the login bypass

activatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user account was activated

pendingVerification.description: Details of the GCash manual payment submission for review

Project.title: Project
Project.description: A saved project linked to a user account

name.description: The name of the saved project

ownerId.description: The UID of the user who owns this project

qrCodeDataUrl.description: The base64 encoded string representing the custom GCash payment QR code

basicPrice.description: The dynamic price of the Basic Plan

premiumPrice.description: The dynamic price of the Premium Plan

upgradePrice.description: The dynamic price to upgrade from Basic to Premium

promoDiscountBasic.description: Optional promotional discount for Basic Plan

promoDiscountPremium.description: Optional promotional discount for Premium Plan

offerTitle.description: The title of a promotional offer

offerExpiry.description: ISO timestamp indicating when the promotional offer expires

updatedBy.description: Email address of the admin who updated the setting

updatedAt.description: ISO timestamp of the last update

users/{userId}/projects/{projectId}.description: Saved projects owned by the user
